title: achillea atrata subsp. multifida
intro: Achillea atrata subsp. multifida, also known as Yarrow, is a perennial herb belonging to the daisy family, characterized by its fern-like leaves and small white flowers. The plant has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Achillea atrata subsp. multifida include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and promoting wound healing, making it a valuable herb for treating various ailments. Herbal preparations of Yarrow can be made into teas, infusions, tinctures, and salves, allowing for a range of applications in natural remedies and skincare products.
